游戏以原创手绘美术与原创音乐，搭建出冥想般的沉浸世界；主线约 30 小时，更有大量隐藏内容等待你用更长的时间慢慢抵达。每一次相遇都有重量，每一次送别都值得珍重。

【游戏特色】
1.沉浸于精巧的手绘世界，在温柔的原创音乐中，开启一段治愈之旅。
2.亲手设计并扩建你的灵魂渡船，将它从一叶小舟打造成承载故事与温度的家园。
3.让耕种、采矿、捕鱼、烹饪、编织、制作构成你的日常，用多样玩法丰富整段旅程。
4.结识性格各异的伙伴，与他们一同旅行，倾听他们未诉说的往事，成为彼此珍爱的朋友。
5.在精心构建的轻平台关卡中自由探索、奔跑、跳跃，解开旅途中的谜题。
6.自由装扮你的船只、角色与小猫，在丰富的自定义选项中，打造独一无二的航行。
7.进入一段随心安排的体验，你可以在片段时光中轻松经营，或是花上30个小时完成这段旅程，更可以用数百小时细细品味每一个隐藏的故事与细节。

cn.description:
《打造世界》结合了策略、方块建造沙盒以及塔防多种元素。游戏中，你不是一个人在战斗，需要带领矮人部落在这个充满危险生物的随机世界里进行探索，安排他们分工合作收集资源，制作需要的物品、武器和盔甲，以及建造城堡，来抵御危险生物的入侵。

【世界探索、沙盒生存】
游戏共有七个不同的世界（游戏本体4个地图+3个dlc地图），每个世界都是随机生成的岛屿，你可以在游戏中自由的改变地形地貌。不同世界有着各自的地理及生物特色，同时也暗藏各类怪物和BOSS。带上大聪明矮人征服各个世界吧！

【资源采集、制作发展】
游戏中挖掘矿藏、捕捉动物、打败敌人、种植农田等等方式获得原料；升级科技树，制作数百种完全不同的物品！要知道除了常规的武器、建筑材料、食物、炼金药水外，你甚至建造一个广大的矿井网，配上升降机和铁路，快速抵达藏有最珍贵金属的矿脉中。如何发展矮人部落，你可要好好思考一下。
对了，必须得告诉你，游戏中存在各种魔法，比如打开传送门，提高矮人运输资源的效率；使用魔法之光照亮黑暗的洞穴吓跑怪物；使用降水或是魔法森林加快树木成长，或者是使用指南针魔法找到隐藏资源，从而帮助加快资源开采，探索世界。

【自由建造、殖民管理】
发展一个部落可没那么容易，你需要安排矮人们的衣食住行，可以直接控制矮人进行挖掘、砍伐、攻击、建造等操作，并在矮人与怪物和BOSS战斗时使用魔法帮助他们。
在游戏刚开始时，你只有1位矮人，随着在这个世界的等级提升，会获得更多的矮人；而随着人数越来越多，部落规模也越来越大的。
部落的发展，建筑是必不可少的，发挥你天马星空的想象吧，无论是建古代宫殿风格、还是想要征服天空的空中住宅、又或者是结合现代科技坚不可摧的堡垒，只要你脑洞够大，创造独属于你的矮人之家！

【即时战略&塔防战斗】
有些怪物会成群结队的来掠夺矮人资源，有些怪物会定期从传送门而来攻打矮人，你需要带领矮人建立攻防系统，在的堡垒周围的路上设满陷阱和导弹塔，抵抗成群结队入侵而来的敌人。

【DLC拓展内容】
丰富的DLC内容拓展既可以带你领略不一样的世界：融合中式风格元素的《龙之神庙》、家园领地保卫战的《孤山世界》、暗黑领主和矮人的终极决战《邪恶之心》，还可以让你在世界探索中增加更多乐趣：女矮人携宠物及新装备登场的《姐妹连》、在神秘的斯芬克斯的沙漠世界探索神庙的《废弃矿山》、充满了植物和古老的魔法的《贪婪洞窟》，召唤英雄战士和法师的《英雄对决》，对抗更加强大的地下深渊头目的《怪物联盟》。

cn.description:
我的足迹MyTracks是一款通过使用GPS数据来记录您的位置的应用程序。它非常适合徒步旅行、慢跑、散步、骑行等各种活动。这款应用程序利用先进的技术提供精确的测量和计算。

以下是您可以使用MyTracks做的事情：
记录您的路线：无论您是徒步旅行、慢跑还是骑行，MyTracks都可以记录您的路径并在地图上显示。
保存收藏的位置：如果有特定的地点您想要记住，您可以将它们标记为应用程序中的收藏夹。
导入和导出数据：MyTracks允许您以多种格式导入和导出数据，如CSV、GPX、KML和KMZ。
提高准确性：您可以进行静态GPS观测，以获得更准确的路标。
轻松导航：该应用程序在指南针上提供路标指南，让您轻松导航到特定位置。
可定制的路标：您可以手动添加路标，也可以从您的收藏位置导入。您甚至可以添加具有角度和距离的矢量。
坐标转换：MyTracks允许您随时在四种不同的坐标格式（十进制、度分秒、MGRS、UTM）之间进行转换。
其他功能：该应用程序在记录过程中显示滑翔比，提供度数或千分度的指南针选项，支持地图上的MGRS网格叠加，并允许您在开始跟踪之前创建路线。
详细记录：您可以在地图上查看您的轨迹并重播路线。该应用程序提供有关您的轨迹的详细统计信息，并显示与每个轨迹相关联的已保存路标。您还可以更改轨迹的颜色以便更容易识别。

请注意，持续在后台使用GPS会快速消耗设备的电池。如果您喜欢我们的应用，请分享好友给予我们支持！如果您有任何反馈或问题，请随时通过miaozhi.ai@gmail.com与我们联系。

cn.description:
Join more than a million musicians and improve your playing with Tunable - Music Practice Tools. More than a chromatic tuner, tone & chord generator, metronome, and recorder, Tunable is a music practice coach that can help you play steadily, in tune, and on beat anywhere you go. Jam-packed with features to help with ear training, breath support, rhythm, timing, and dynamics, Tunable is easy to use yet feature-rich. Tunable tracks your playing habits and gives feedback to help you improve. Equipped with a unique “tuning history” display for viewing pitch as you play, an easy to use metronome and a handy audio recorder, Tunable is the perfect toolkit for beginning to professional musicians. Grab Tunable today and use in your next practice session, group rehearsal, band class, or live performance.

Why are Broadway musicians, students at Juilliard, National Youth Orchestras and beginning instrumentalists using Tunable?

GET FEEDBACK ON HOW YOU PLAY
• It's like a music instructor in your pocket. Record a practice session and get a practice score with note graphs to help summarize your playing.

LEARN TO PLAY IN TUNE WITH SUSTAINED PITCH HISTORY™
• Visualize how steadily you play or sing. The straighter the white line, the more consistent the pitch. 

IMPROVE YOUR EAR WITH TONE AND CHORD GENERATOR
• Use the tone and chord generator to play and sustain chords with various tone options. Toggle between different temperaments to hear how they compare. 

KEEP TEMPO WITH AN ACCURATE METRONOME
• See the pulse with a visual metronome. View subdivision and current beat, with a large display and (optional) visual flash. 

RECORD YOUR SESSIONS AND SHARE WITH EASE
• Record practices and performances. Add reverb for a professional sound. Share recordings with family, friends, and teachers.

FEATURES OVERVIEW

TUNER
• Large, colorful tuning indicator clearly shows when in tune (green fills the screen)
• Clear, visual tuner with note, octave, cents (+\-), and frequency (Hz) display
• Sustained Pitch History™ tuning display to see how you’re sustaining notes over time
• Especially suited for wind instruments, strings, and vocals with note detection from Tuba to Piccolo
• Adjustable A=440 reference tone
• Create your own or change between Equal, Just, Pythagorean, and 15 other tuning temperaments

TONE AND CHORD GENERATOR
• Chromatic Tone Generator and Full Piano with multiple tone options
• Play and sustain single notes or chords
• Continues playing when the screen is locked or in the background

METRONOME
• Large number display with optional visual flash to see the downbeat and each subdivision
• Adjust tempo, beats per measure, and subdivision to fit your needs
• Accent or mute individual subdivisions
• Sync metronome to nearby devices so they run at the same tempo and in time (via Ableton Link)
• Select from over 30 metronome sounds
• Tempo Tap (tap metronome center to set a tempo)
• Continues playing when the screen is locked or in the background

RECORD PRACTICE SESSIONS
• Record and save unlimited recordings
• Receive a score and individual note graphs per recording
• Organize recordings into folders
• Search by name to find past recordings
• Easily share recordings and practice scores
• Playback recordings at 0x - 3x speed

AND MORE
• Transpose notes to any instrument
• 15 Notations to choose from
• AppleTV/AirPlay mirroring
• Dark and light themes
• Siri Shortcuts access to common tasks

Tunable is especially great with voice, wind, and string instruments:
• Guitar, Ukelele
• Piccolo, Flute
• Oboe, English Horn, Bassoon
• Clarinet
• Saxophone
• Trumpet and Cornet
• French Horn
• Tenor and Bass Trombone
• Euphonium and Tuba
• Violin, Viola, Chello, and Bass
• Voice

TESTIMONIALS
• "The best tuner, metronome, and recorder on iOS and a pitch-perfect bargain for any musician." — MacLife
• "Tunable shows musicians what pitch-perfect means as they play." — Engadget
• "Tunable doesn't just tell you how you sound -- it shows you." — FastCoDesign

cn.description:

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

hk.description:
我的足跡MyTracks是一個使用GPS數據來追蹤您位置的應用程式。它非常適合各種活動，如徒步旅行、慢跑、散步、騎自行車等等。這款應用程式利用先進的技術提供精確的測量和計算。

以下是您可以使用MyTracks進行的操作：
追蹤您的路線：無論是徒步旅行、慢跑還是騎行，MyTracks都能夠記錄您的路徑並在地圖上顯示。
保存喜愛的位置：如果有特定地點您想要記住，您可以在應用程式中將其標記為喜愛的位置。
匯入和匯出數據：MyTracks允許您以CSV、GPX、KML和KMZ等多種格式匯入和匯出數據。
提高準確性：您可以進行靜態GPS觀測，以獲得更準確的路標。
輕鬆導航：該應用程式在指南針上提供路標導航，讓您輕鬆導航到指定位置。
可自訂的路標：您可以手動添加路標，或從喜愛的位置中導入路標。您甚至可以添加具有角度和距離的向量。
座標轉換：MyTracks允許您隨時在四種不同座標格式（十進制、度分秒、MGRS、UTM）之間進行轉換。
其他功能：該應用程式在錄製過程中顯示滑翔比，提供度數或千分度的指南針選項，支援地圖上的MGRS網格疊加，並允許您在開始追蹤之前創建路線。
詳細記錄：您可以在地圖上查看您的追蹤軌跡並重播路線。該應用程式提供有關您的軌跡的詳細統計信息，並顯示與每個追蹤相關的已保存路標。您還可以更改追蹤的顏色以便更容易識別。

請注意，持續在背景使用GPS會快速耗盡設備的電池。如果您喜歡我們的應用，請分享好友給予我們支持！如果您有任何回饋或問題，請隨時透過miaozhi.ai@gmail.com與我們聯繫。

hk.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

hk.description:
New version of the multi-awarded board game. Now in 3D. Includes improved AI, 3D landscape, new exclusive features.

*** Carcassonne fits that opening game niche that every game group needs. -Tyler Nichols, Board Game Quest
*** Carcassonne = Great game, great mechanics, great pieces, great fun! -The Board Game Family

A TILE PLACEMENT GAME OF CREATING LANDSCAPES, CLAIMING AREAS, AND GAINING POINTS
Discover or re-discover Carcassonne, the multi-awarded tile-based game in which players draw and place their tiles to build a medieval city. Place your cities, roads, abbeys or fields to enlarge your landscape, then place your followers, the meeples. Knights, robbers or farmers... Each meeple will help you control your territory and win points.
But be careful, you will need all your best strategy and tactics to maximum your points! Place your tiles and your meeples wisely to stop your opponents and win the game.

6 EXPANSIONS: ENLARGE YOUR LANDSCAPE AND OPTIMIZE YOUR POINTS
Thanks to the mini expansions ""The River"" and ""The Abbot"", you can embellish your landscape and vary your game to enjoy new ways to play! Double or even triple your points thanks to the new buildings in the Inns & Cathedrals expansion! And with the Traders & Builders expansion, score more points with the trading commodities and build faster with the builders! Discover the city of Carcassonne covered with a blanket of white snow in the Winter Edition... and look out for the Gingerbread Man and the bonus points he'll give you! Beware of the Dragon in ""the Princess and the Dragon"" expansion! He could eat your Meeples if you're not cautious. And be kind with the Princess: she might prefer you to other Meeples and toss them out of the cities!

FEATURES
• Accessible and tactical gameplay adapted from the award-winning Carcassonne board game    
• 6 expansions:
- The River, the Inns & Cathedrals, the Traders & Builders, the Winter Edition and Princess & Dragon are all available to purchase from the Game Shop.
- Unlock The Abbot for free using your Asmodee account.
• Up to 6 players! Play against the computer in solo mode, face off your friends in Pass and Play or challenge players from around the world in online mode
• There is no more 3 but 4 different behaviors you can chose before starting a game with AIs. They all propose a better challenge than the previous ones. Players who want to experiment a true challenge will play against the Conqueror AI who is the strongest AI of the game.
• Try out the aerial top view to refine your strategy!
• Additional strategic layers compared to the physical version:
- field view which allows you to see the field possession of each player
- remaining tile list: allows you to see the tiles which are remaining in the draw pile

Languages available: English, French, German, Italian, Spanish

You can follow us on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and You Tube!

Twitter: https://twitter.com/asmodeedigital
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/asmodeedigital/
You Tube: https://www.youtube.com/asmodeedigital

hk.description:
消除、戰鬥、冒險的全新進化！
Hero Emblems II是款結合『橫向卷軸』與『Match-3消除方塊』的日式角色扮演遊戲，玩家將扮演著黑夜旅團的成員，為了幫助受難的民眾而一步步踏上成為英雄的冒險旅程。


【遊戲特色】
◆爽快刺激的戰鬥消除
透過Match-3的消除規則，讓英雄們發動攻擊，還可合成魔法紋章施展強力技能，試著連續消除發動強力攻勢，擊飛眼前的敵人吧。

◆享受王道日式RPG的樂趣
在劍與魔法所構成的世界中，玩家扮演黑夜旅團一同啟程冒險，勇闖深邃的洞窟，尋找古老遺跡的神祕寶箱，途中隨時與兇惡的魔物戰鬥，到村莊添購新裝備，也順道去酒館與村民們打聽情報，體驗JRPG的遊戲魅力。

◆可替換上陣的英雄
英雄們各自有著不同背景與能力，像是人族的戰士、貂族的騎士、貓族的黑魔法師、蛙族的吟遊詩人等，依照戰鬥狀況抑或是個人喜好，安排您的英雄隊伍吧！

◆熱鬧的日文戰鬥語音
搭配英雄身分所錄製的個性化語音，讓戰鬥氣氛更顯活潑熱鬧。

◆更豐富的裝備設計
這次敵人將帶著更多元的屬性攻擊，像是中毒、燃燒、石化或詛咒等，為了對抗這些頑強的敵人，不但要裝備各式武器防具，還可配戴防止負向狀態攻擊或提升能力的飾品。

◆強化戰力的『飲食系統』
英雄的冒險旅途總是充滿各種挑戰，兇惡的魔物不但力量強大，多樣的攻擊型態總讓人措手不及，現在英雄可透過享用美食來增加能力，用更爽快的節奏來擊破魔物的攻勢吧！

◆一次付費、無內購、無廣告

黑夜旅團的新篇章
很久以前，曾經有個名為『黑夜旅團』的傭兵集團，不以賺錢營利為主，反而是四處幫助有需要的人們，在戰亂時幫助了不少受難的民眾，不過隨著和平的到來，黑夜旅團漸漸失去了舞台而不得不解散。但有四個年輕人--查克、陸斯恩、錫德與奧蒂莉亞，決定要傳承這個精神，於是再次組成了新的黑夜旅團。

在一次的任務中，查克一行人意外的拯救了一位精靈少女-多洛莉絲，獲救的精靈少女卻失去記憶，遠離精靈國度來到人族領地的舉動讓錫德產生了擔憂，但真正要讓黑夜旅團擔憂的事情才正要開始！


** 建議使用iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 第五代/iPad Pro或後續機種可以獲得更順暢的體驗**

hk.description:
有史以來最好的劈砍遊戲現在能夠放進您的口袋裡了！

最初於2006年在電腦上發布的《泰坦之旅》是一款動作角色扮演遊戲，設定為神話的背景。泰坦從監獄逃脫，不顧一切地要毀滅地球。上帝自個不能阻止他們-需要一個英雄來領導這場史詩般的爭鬥。勝利或失敗都將決定人類的命運和奧林匹亞的命運。

您就是英雄！創建您的角色，探索遠古的文明如希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國，並與成群的傳奇生物戰鬥！掌握射箭、劍法或者魔法的藝術，併升級您的角色來解鎖令人驚嘆的力量！發現特別的項目來幫助您完成您的任務：傳說中的劍，毀滅性的雷電，施了魔法的弓，以及更多！

這個特別適用於移動設備的新版本提供了許多新的特點：

● 全新的點觸操作界面
● 完全重新設計的點觸遊戲
● 高品質的圖形
● 巨大的、開放的世界供您探索
● 完全的日/夜循環
● 80種不同的神話生物：牛頭人身怪，獨眼巨人，蛇發女妖和更多
● 1200多個等待您去發現的項目
● 30個不同的角色分類
● 150種不同的角色技能
● 超過60個小時的巨量遊戲時間
● 逐級增進的難度模式：與您的技能水平匹配的武器和敵人
● 數十種不可鎖定的成就等待您去發現
● 無廣告，沒有微交易。

混合了遠古神話和不停的動作的《泰坦之旅》是一款典型的劈砍遊戲，以快速、激烈的節奏提供活力十足的遊戲。征服驚心動魄的挑戰，戰勝入侵移動世界的最強大敵人！

可在應用內購買的DLC： 
● 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。
● 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！
● 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！
● 在永恆餘燼DLC 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

在期盼已久的 「  Clouds & Sheep 」遊戲續集中，可愛的羊羣終於再次得以解放！完成無數任務，滿足綿羊朋友的需求。種植花草樹木並剪不同顏色的羊毛來採購資源！收集快樂星星，收割木材和花瓣，並用它們來爲羊羣提供食物、飾品、玩具和其他東西！控制雲朵，及時降雨，確保綿羊永遠都不會缺飲用水。如果你的綿羊感到高興且滿足，牠們就會生下小羔羊！

每只動物都需要你的關注！這些滾圓的綿羊喜歡休閒娛樂！讓你的綿羊跳躍起來，並使用蹦牀、蹺蹺板和鞦韆主動和牠們一起玩耍！旁觀你的寵物們互相交流，給牠們一些物品，然後觀察牠們的反應！使用有趣的物品自定義你的羊羣牧場，並從狂野西域和海盜領域等不同設定中進行選擇。旁觀你的羊羣白天不知疲憊地奔跑，而到了晚上就依着溫暖的篝火而眠。儘可能讓綿羊保持心情愉快、身體健康，防牠們變成天空中綿狀的大雲朵。

特色：
- 去除廣告！
- 一流遊戲「  Clouds & Sheep 」的精彩續集
- 踏上史詩般的探險之路，找到傳奇般的青春泉水！
- 擁有可愛綿羊的模擬遊戲
- 照顧好羊羣
- 飼養甜美的小羔羊
- 積極和羊羣玩耍
- 給牠們提供許多不同的物品
- 種植並收割不同的資源
- 剪羊毛
- 自定義農場
- 控制天氣
- 日夜循環
- 3D 世界中的開放式遊戲設定
- 適合兒童，但全家人一起玩也非常有趣
- 支持MFi遊戲手柄
- 支持Game Center

將自己小村莊建成一個恢宏的中世紀帝國，打造繁榮的經濟和幸福的居民！尋覓採礦點，收割農作物，向國民徵收稅幣。營建角鬥場、酒館、市場，並用精美的雕塑、壯麗的紀念碑以及蔥郁的花園美化自己的城市。但是，仍然危機四伏。強盜在附近出沒，尋機掠奪和打劫您的和平城鎮。營建兵營，招募勇敢的士兵，建造守衛塔，保護你的鎮民免受傷害。從自己的城堡統治整個帝國，確保臣民歡樂幸福！

特色

Stream的建立是為了給你一個無縫的聽，管理和同步雲音樂體驗。它允許你創建與雲存儲Box這樣，Dropbox，谷歌驅動器，OneDrive和Yandex.Disk個人流媒體服務，以節省空間，您的設備上訪問您的所有音樂。

怎麼運行的？
上傳所有的音樂到您最喜愛的雲存儲，然後使用Stream連接，並隨時隨地欣賞音樂。

訪問您最喜愛的音樂在您的所有設備：iPhone，iPad的，iPod的庫，Box，Dropbox，谷歌驅動器，OneDrive，Yandex.Disk和您的計算機。聽你的音樂與先進和強大的媒體播放器。

hk.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

hk.releaseNotes: 快來加入偵探皮埃爾的冒險之旅吧！
hk.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事
故事劇情撲朔迷離，體驗追蹤嫌犯找回寶石的全過程和破解趣味謎題的樂趣
 
- 多語言支持
支持簡繁中文、英語、法語、德語、日語、俄語、西班牙語、義大利語、韓語等10種語言

mo.description:
我的足跡MyTracks是一個使用GPS數據來追蹤您位置的應用程式。它非常適合各種活動，如徒步旅行、慢跑、散步、騎自行車等等。這款應用程式利用先進的技術提供精確的測量和計算。

以下是您可以使用MyTracks進行的操作：
追蹤您的路線：無論是徒步旅行、慢跑還是騎行，MyTracks都能夠記錄您的路徑並在地圖上顯示。
保存喜愛的位置：如果有特定地點您想要記住，您可以在應用程式中將其標記為喜愛的位置。
匯入和匯出數據：MyTracks允許您以CSV、GPX、KML和KMZ等多種格式匯入和匯出數據。
提高準確性：您可以進行靜態GPS觀測，以獲得更準確的路標。
輕鬆導航：該應用程式在指南針上提供路標導航，讓您輕鬆導航到指定位置。
可自訂的路標：您可以手動添加路標，或從喜愛的位置中導入路標。您甚至可以添加具有角度和距離的向量。
座標轉換：MyTracks允許您隨時在四種不同座標格式（十進制、度分秒、MGRS、UTM）之間進行轉換。
其他功能：該應用程式在錄製過程中顯示滑翔比，提供度數或千分度的指南針選項，支援地圖上的MGRS網格疊加，並允許您在開始追蹤之前創建路線。
詳細記錄：您可以在地圖上查看您的追蹤軌跡並重播路線。該應用程式提供有關您的軌跡的詳細統計信息，並顯示與每個追蹤相關的已保存路標。您還可以更改追蹤的顏色以便更容易識別。

請注意，持續在背景使用GPS會快速耗盡設備的電池。如果您喜歡我們的應用，請分享好友給予我們支持！如果您有任何回饋或問題，請隨時透過miaozhi.ai@gmail.com與我們聯繫。

mo.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

mo.description:
New version of the multi-awarded board game. Now in 3D. Includes improved AI, 3D landscape, new exclusive features.

*** Carcassonne fits that opening game niche that every game group needs. -Tyler Nichols, Board Game Quest
*** Carcassonne = Great game, great mechanics, great pieces, great fun! -The Board Game Family

A TILE PLACEMENT GAME OF CREATING LANDSCAPES, CLAIMING AREAS, AND GAINING POINTS
Discover or re-discover Carcassonne, the multi-awarded tile-based game in which players draw and place their tiles to build a medieval city. Place your cities, roads, abbeys or fields to enlarge your landscape, then place your followers, the meeples. Knights, robbers or farmers... Each meeple will help you control your territory and win points.
But be careful, you will need all your best strategy and tactics to maximum your points! Place your tiles and your meeples wisely to stop your opponents and win the game.

6 EXPANSIONS: ENLARGE YOUR LANDSCAPE AND OPTIMIZE YOUR POINTS
Thanks to the mini expansions ""The River"" and ""The Abbot"", you can embellish your landscape and vary your game to enjoy new ways to play! Double or even triple your points thanks to the new buildings in the Inns & Cathedrals expansion! And with the Traders & Builders expansion, score more points with the trading commodities and build faster with the builders! Discover the city of Carcassonne covered with a blanket of white snow in the Winter Edition... and look out for the Gingerbread Man and the bonus points he'll give you! Beware of the Dragon in ""the Princess and the Dragon"" expansion! He could eat your Meeples if you're not cautious. And be kind with the Princess: she might prefer you to other Meeples and toss them out of the cities!

FEATURES
• Accessible and tactical gameplay adapted from the award-winning Carcassonne board game    
• 6 expansions:
- The River, the Inns & Cathedrals, the Traders & Builders, the Winter Edition and Princess & Dragon are all available to purchase from the Game Shop.
- Unlock The Abbot for free using your Asmodee account.
• Up to 6 players! Play against the computer in solo mode, face off your friends in Pass and Play or challenge players from around the world in online mode
• There is no more 3 but 4 different behaviors you can chose before starting a game with AIs. They all propose a better challenge than the previous ones. Players who want to experiment a true challenge will play against the Conqueror AI who is the strongest AI of the game.
• Try out the aerial top view to refine your strategy!
• Additional strategic layers compared to the physical version:
- field view which allows you to see the field possession of each player
- remaining tile list: allows you to see the tiles which are remaining in the draw pile

Languages available: English, French, German, Italian, Spanish

消除、戰鬥、冒險的全新進化！
Hero Emblems II是款結合『橫向卷軸』與『Match-3消除方塊』的日式角色扮演遊戲，玩家將扮演著黑夜旅團的成員，為了幫助受難的民眾而一步步踏上成為英雄的冒險旅程。


【遊戲特色】
◆爽快刺激的戰鬥消除
透過Match-3的消除規則，讓英雄們發動攻擊，還可合成魔法紋章施展強力技能，試著連續消除發動強力攻勢，擊飛眼前的敵人吧。

◆享受王道日式RPG的樂趣
在劍與魔法所構成的世界中，玩家扮演黑夜旅團一同啟程冒險，勇闖深邃的洞窟，尋找古老遺跡的神祕寶箱，途中隨時與兇惡的魔物戰鬥，到村莊添購新裝備，也順道去酒館與村民們打聽情報，體驗JRPG的遊戲魅力。

◆可替換上陣的英雄
英雄們各自有著不同背景與能力，像是人族的戰士、貂族的騎士、貓族的黑魔法師、蛙族的吟遊詩人等，依照戰鬥狀況抑或是個人喜好，安排您的英雄隊伍吧！

◆熱鬧的日文戰鬥語音
搭配英雄身分所錄製的個性化語音，讓戰鬥氣氛更顯活潑熱鬧。

◆更豐富的裝備設計
這次敵人將帶著更多元的屬性攻擊，像是中毒、燃燒、石化或詛咒等，為了對抗這些頑強的敵人，不但要裝備各式武器防具，還可配戴防止負向狀態攻擊或提升能力的飾品。

◆強化戰力的『飲食系統』
英雄的冒險旅途總是充滿各種挑戰，兇惡的魔物不但力量強大，多樣的攻擊型態總讓人措手不及，現在英雄可透過享用美食來增加能力，用更爽快的節奏來擊破魔物的攻勢吧！

◆一次付費、無內購、無廣告

黑夜旅團的新篇章
很久以前，曾經有個名為『黑夜旅團』的傭兵集團，不以賺錢營利為主，反而是四處幫助有需要的人們，在戰亂時幫助了不少受難的民眾，不過隨著和平的到來，黑夜旅團漸漸失去了舞台而不得不解散。但有四個年輕人--查克、陸斯恩、錫德與奧蒂莉亞，決定要傳承這個精神，於是再次組成了新的黑夜旅團。

在一次的任務中，查克一行人意外的拯救了一位精靈少女-多洛莉絲，獲救的精靈少女卻失去記憶，遠離精靈國度來到人族領地的舉動讓錫德產生了擔憂，但真正要讓黑夜旅團擔憂的事情才正要開始！


** 建議使用iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 第五代/iPad Pro或後續機種可以獲得更順暢的體驗**

mo.description:
有史以來最好的劈砍遊戲現在能夠放進您的口袋裡了！

最初於2006年在電腦上發布的《泰坦之旅》是一款動作角色扮演遊戲，設定為神話的背景。泰坦從監獄逃脫，不顧一切地要毀滅地球。上帝自個不能阻止他們-需要一個英雄來領導這場史詩般的爭鬥。勝利或失敗都將決定人類的命運和奧林匹亞的命運。

您就是英雄！創建您的角色，探索遠古的文明如希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國，並與成群的傳奇生物戰鬥！掌握射箭、劍法或者魔法的藝術，併升級您的角色來解鎖令人驚嘆的力量！發現特別的項目來幫助您完成您的任務：傳說中的劍，毀滅性的雷電，施了魔法的弓，以及更多！

這個特別適用於移動設備的新版本提供了許多新的特點：

● 全新的點觸操作界面
● 完全重新設計的點觸遊戲
● 高品質的圖形
● 巨大的、開放的世界供您探索
● 完全的日/夜循環
● 80種不同的神話生物：牛頭人身怪，獨眼巨人，蛇發女妖和更多
● 1200多個等待您去發現的項目
● 30個不同的角色分類
● 150種不同的角色技能
● 超過60個小時的巨量遊戲時間
● 逐級增進的難度模式：與您的技能水平匹配的武器和敵人
● 數十種不可鎖定的成就等待您去發現
● 無廣告，沒有微交易。

混合了遠古神話和不停的動作的《泰坦之旅》是一款典型的劈砍遊戲，以快速、激烈的節奏提供活力十足的遊戲。征服驚心動魄的挑戰，戰勝入侵移動世界的最強大敵人！

可在應用內購買的DLC： 
● 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。
● 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！
● 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！
● 在永恆餘燼DLC 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

加入超過 900,000 位音樂家的行列，一起使用 Tunable，將您的 iPhone、iPad 和 iPod Touch 變成最好的調音器、音樂調諧器、拍子機和錄音機。這樣您就能隨時隨地學習怎樣演奏得穩定、音準和合拍。Tunable 獨有「調音記錄」顯示功能，以視覺呈現音高的變化，還有易於使用的拍子機和錄音機，是音樂新手和專業音樂家的完美工具。

◆ 學習以穩定的音準演奏
以視覺呈現你玩音樂或唱歌的穩定程度。每發出一個音，就會以白線描繪出音準的穩定程度。白線越直，音高越穩定一致。

◆ 透過音樂調諧器訓練耳朵靈敏度
需要參考音調或和弦？可使用音樂調諧器播放並維持各種所選音色的和弦。選擇不同律式，聽聽有何不同。

◆ 記錄和分享
記錄您的練習和表演。添上專業混音。透過電子郵件、SoundCloud、Dropbox 等分享錄音。

音樂調諧器

拍子機

其他

Stream的建立是為了給你一個無縫的聽，管理和同步雲音樂體驗。它允許你創建與雲存儲Box這樣，Dropbox，谷歌驅動器，OneDrive和Yandex.Disk個人流媒體服務，以節省空間，您的設備上訪問您的所有音樂。

怎麼運行的？
上傳所有的音樂到您最喜愛的雲存儲，然後使用Stream連接，並隨時隨地欣賞音樂。

添加你的音樂到您的設備沒有iTunes，簡單，使用本地的無線網絡傳輸或下載音樂快速到你的iPhone，以發揮它沒有互聯網（離線模式）。這是一個多雲系，因此你可以聽音樂的名單，無論它們的存儲。

訪問您最喜愛的音樂在您的所有設備：iPhone，iPad的，iPod的庫，Box，Dropbox，谷歌驅動器，OneDrive，Yandex.Disk和您的計算機。聽你的音樂與先進和強大的媒體播放器。

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者

mo.releaseNotes: 快來加入偵探皮埃爾的冒險之旅吧！
mo.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿
500+個互動點，內設豐富的文化元素及遊戲梗
 
- 地圖暗藏玄機
超過100個收集物件及隱藏解謎，10張地圖風格各異
 
- 沉浸式聽覺
原創音樂，帶你夢回童趣世界
 
- 獨特故事
故事劇情撲朔迷離，體驗追蹤嫌犯找回寶石的全過程和破解趣味謎題的樂趣
 
- 多語言支持
支持簡繁中文、英語、法語、德語、日語、俄語、西班牙語、義大利語、韓語等10種語言

tw.releaseNotes: 我們會儘可能頻繁地更新應用程式，以使其更快、更可靠。
tw.description:
我的足跡MyTracks是一個使用GPS數據來追蹤您位置的應用程式。它非常適合各種活動，如徒步旅行、慢跑、散步、騎自行車等等。這款應用程式利用先進的技術提供精確的測量和計算。

以下是您可以使用MyTracks進行的操作：
追蹤您的路線：無論是徒步旅行、慢跑還是騎行，MyTracks都能夠記錄您的路徑並在地圖上顯示。
保存喜愛的位置：如果有特定地點您想要記住，您可以在應用程式中將其標記為喜愛的位置。
匯入和匯出數據：MyTracks允許您以CSV、GPX、KML和KMZ等多種格式匯入和匯出數據。
提高準確性：您可以進行靜態GPS觀測，以獲得更準確的路標。
輕鬆導航：該應用程式在指南針上提供路標導航，讓您輕鬆導航到指定位置。
可自訂的路標：您可以手動添加路標，或從喜愛的位置中導入路標。您甚至可以添加具有角度和距離的向量。
座標轉換：MyTracks允許您隨時在四種不同座標格式（十進制、度分秒、MGRS、UTM）之間進行轉換。
其他功能：該應用程式在錄製過程中顯示滑翔比，提供度數或千分度的指南針選項，支援地圖上的MGRS網格疊加，並允許您在開始追蹤之前創建路線。
詳細記錄：您可以在地圖上查看您的追蹤軌跡並重播路線。該應用程式提供有關您的軌跡的詳細統計信息，並顯示與每個追蹤相關的已保存路標。您還可以更改追蹤的顏色以便更容易識別。

請注意，持續在背景使用GPS會快速耗盡設備的電池。如果您喜歡我們的應用，請分享好友給予我們支持！如果您有任何回饋或問題，請隨時透過miaozhi.ai@gmail.com與我們聯繫。

tw.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

tw.description:
New version of the multi-awarded board game. Now in 3D. Includes improved AI, 3D landscape, new exclusive features.

*** Carcassonne fits that opening game niche that every game group needs. -Tyler Nichols, Board Game Quest
*** Carcassonne = Great game, great mechanics, great pieces, great fun! -The Board Game Family

A TILE PLACEMENT GAME OF CREATING LANDSCAPES, CLAIMING AREAS, AND GAINING POINTS
Discover or re-discover Carcassonne, the multi-awarded tile-based game in which players draw and place their tiles to build a medieval city. Place your cities, roads, abbeys or fields to enlarge your landscape, then place your followers, the meeples. Knights, robbers or farmers... Each meeple will help you control your territory and win points.
But be careful, you will need all your best strategy and tactics to maximum your points! Place your tiles and your meeples wisely to stop your opponents and win the game.

6 EXPANSIONS: ENLARGE YOUR LANDSCAPE AND OPTIMIZE YOUR POINTS
Thanks to the mini expansions ""The River"" and ""The Abbot"", you can embellish your landscape and vary your game to enjoy new ways to play! Double or even triple your points thanks to the new buildings in the Inns & Cathedrals expansion! And with the Traders & Builders expansion, score more points with the trading commodities and build faster with the builders! Discover the city of Carcassonne covered with a blanket of white snow in the Winter Edition... and look out for the Gingerbread Man and the bonus points he'll give you! Beware of the Dragon in ""the Princess and the Dragon"" expansion! He could eat your Meeples if you're not cautious. And be kind with the Princess: she might prefer you to other Meeples and toss them out of the cities!

FEATURES
• Accessible and tactical gameplay adapted from the award-winning Carcassonne board game    
• 6 expansions:
- The River, the Inns & Cathedrals, the Traders & Builders, the Winter Edition and Princess & Dragon are all available to purchase from the Game Shop.
- Unlock The Abbot for free using your Asmodee account.
• Up to 6 players! Play against the computer in solo mode, face off your friends in Pass and Play or challenge players from around the world in online mode
• There is no more 3 but 4 different behaviors you can chose before starting a game with AIs. They all propose a better challenge than the previous ones. Players who want to experiment a true challenge will play against the Conqueror AI who is the strongest AI of the game.
• Try out the aerial top view to refine your strategy!
• Additional strategic layers compared to the physical version:
- field view which allows you to see the field possession of each player
- remaining tile list: allows you to see the tiles which are remaining in the draw pile

Languages available: English, French, German, Italian, Spanish

Twitter: https://twitter.com/asmodeedigital

tw.description:
消除、戰鬥、冒險的全新進化！
Hero Emblems II是款結合『橫向卷軸』與『Match-3消除方塊』的日式角色扮演遊戲，玩家將扮演著黑夜旅團的成員，為了幫助受難的民眾而一步步踏上成為英雄的冒險旅程。


【遊戲特色】
◆爽快刺激的戰鬥消除
透過Match-3的消除規則，讓英雄們發動攻擊，還可合成魔法紋章施展強力技能，試著連續消除發動強力攻勢，擊飛眼前的敵人吧。

◆享受王道日式RPG的樂趣
在劍與魔法所構成的世界中，玩家扮演黑夜旅團一同啟程冒險，勇闖深邃的洞窟，尋找古老遺跡的神祕寶箱，途中隨時與兇惡的魔物戰鬥，到村莊添購新裝備，也順道去酒館與村民們打聽情報，體驗JRPG的遊戲魅力。

◆可替換上陣的英雄
英雄們各自有著不同背景與能力，像是人族的戰士、貂族的騎士、貓族的黑魔法師、蛙族的吟遊詩人等，依照戰鬥狀況抑或是個人喜好，安排您的英雄隊伍吧！

◆熱鬧的日文戰鬥語音
搭配英雄身分所錄製的個性化語音，讓戰鬥氣氛更顯活潑熱鬧。

◆更豐富的裝備設計
這次敵人將帶著更多元的屬性攻擊，像是中毒、燃燒、石化或詛咒等，為了對抗這些頑強的敵人，不但要裝備各式武器防具，還可配戴防止負向狀態攻擊或提升能力的飾品。

◆強化戰力的『飲食系統』
英雄的冒險旅途總是充滿各種挑戰，兇惡的魔物不但力量強大，多樣的攻擊型態總讓人措手不及，現在英雄可透過享用美食來增加能力，用更爽快的節奏來擊破魔物的攻勢吧！

◆一次付費、無內購、無廣告

黑夜旅團的新篇章
很久以前，曾經有個名為『黑夜旅團』的傭兵集團，不以賺錢營利為主，反而是四處幫助有需要的人們，在戰亂時幫助了不少受難的民眾，不過隨著和平的到來，黑夜旅團漸漸失去了舞台而不得不解散。但有四個年輕人--查克、陸斯恩、錫德與奧蒂莉亞，決定要傳承這個精神，於是再次組成了新的黑夜旅團。

在一次的任務中，查克一行人意外的拯救了一位精靈少女-多洛莉絲，獲救的精靈少女卻失去記憶，遠離精靈國度來到人族領地的舉動讓錫德產生了擔憂，但真正要讓黑夜旅團擔憂的事情才正要開始！


** 建議使用iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 第五代/iPad Pro或後續機種可以獲得更順暢的體驗**

tw.description:
有史以來最好的劈砍遊戲現在能夠放進您的口袋裡了！

最初於2006年在電腦上發布的《泰坦之旅》是一款動作角色扮演遊戲，設定為神話的背景。泰坦從監獄逃脫，不顧一切地要毀滅地球。上帝自個不能阻止他們-需要一個英雄來領導這場史詩般的爭鬥。勝利或失敗都將決定人類的命運和奧林匹亞的命運。

您就是英雄！創建您的角色，探索遠古的文明如希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國，並與成群的傳奇生物戰鬥！掌握射箭、劍法或者魔法的藝術，併升級您的角色來解鎖令人驚嘆的力量！發現特別的項目來幫助您完成您的任務：傳說中的劍，毀滅性的雷電，施了魔法的弓，以及更多！

這個特別適用於移動設備的新版本提供了許多新的特點：

● 全新的點觸操作界面
● 完全重新設計的點觸遊戲
● 高品質的圖形
● 巨大的、開放的世界供您探索
● 完全的日/夜循環
● 80種不同的神話生物：牛頭人身怪，獨眼巨人，蛇發女妖和更多
● 1200多個等待您去發現的項目
● 30個不同的角色分類
● 150種不同的角色技能
● 超過60個小時的巨量遊戲時間
● 逐級增進的難度模式：與您的技能水平匹配的武器和敵人
● 數十種不可鎖定的成就等待您去發現
● 無廣告，沒有微交易。

混合了遠古神話和不停的動作的《泰坦之旅》是一款典型的劈砍遊戲，以快速、激烈的節奏提供活力十足的遊戲。征服驚心動魄的挑戰，戰勝入侵移動世界的最強大敵人！

可在應用內購買的DLC： 
● 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。
● 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！
● 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！
● 在永恆餘燼DLC 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

tw.description:
在期盼已久的 「  Clouds & Sheep 」遊戲續集中，可愛的羊羣終於再次得以解放！完成無數任務，滿足綿羊朋友的需求。種植花草樹木並剪不同顏色的羊毛來採購資源！收集快樂星星，收割木材和花瓣，並用它們來爲羊羣提供食物、飾品、玩具和其他東西！控制雲朵，及時降雨，確保綿羊永遠都不會缺飲用水。如果你的綿羊感到高興且滿足，牠們就會生下小羔羊！

每只動物都需要你的關注！這些滾圓的綿羊喜歡休閒娛樂！讓你的綿羊跳躍起來，並使用蹦牀、蹺蹺板和鞦韆主動和牠們一起玩耍！旁觀你的寵物們互相交流，給牠們一些物品，然後觀察牠們的反應！使用有趣的物品自定義你的羊羣牧場，並從狂野西域和海盜領域等不同設定中進行選擇。旁觀你的羊羣白天不知疲憊地奔跑，而到了晚上就依着溫暖的篝火而眠。儘可能讓綿羊保持心情愉快、身體健康，防牠們變成天空中綿狀的大雲朵。

特色：
- 去除廣告！
- 一流遊戲「  Clouds & Sheep 」的精彩續集
- 踏上史詩般的探險之路，找到傳奇般的青春泉水！
- 擁有可愛綿羊的模擬遊戲
- 照顧好羊羣
- 飼養甜美的小羔羊
- 積極和羊羣玩耍
- 給牠們提供許多不同的物品

- 適合兒童，但全家人一起玩也非常有趣
- 支持MFi遊戲手柄

tw.description:
我們將卡牌遊戲與 Roguelike 遊戲融為一體，製作出了這款最棒的單機牌組構築遊戲。打造出獨一無二的牌組、遇見無數離奇的生物、發現威力強大的遺物、去屠戮這座高塔吧！

遊戲特色
- 動態構建的牌組：謹慎選擇你的卡牌！在攀爬高塔的途中邂逅百餘張不同的卡牌，選擇是否將它們加入你的牌組，透過組合和搭配來讓牌組發揮力量，打敗敵人、挑戰登頂。
- 不斷變化的高塔：每次開始爬塔的旅程時，高塔的構造都會發生變化。是選擇高風險高回報，還是謹慎前行？面對不同的敵人、選擇不同的卡牌、發現不同的遺物、甚至挑戰不同的首領！
- 威力強大的遺物：在塔中你將發現名為遺物的各種強大物品，這些遺物可能會與你的牌組產生強大的化學反應，讓你的戰力得到飛躍。但也不要過於大意，為了獲得遺物，有時你所付出的代價，可會超過區區金錢……

tw.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

Stream的建立是為了給你一個無縫的聽，管理和同步雲音樂體驗。它允許你創建與雲存儲Box這樣，Dropbox，谷歌驅動器，OneDrive和Yandex.Disk個人流媒體服務，以節省空間，您的設備上訪問您的所有音樂。

怎麼運行的？
上傳所有的音樂到您最喜愛的雲存儲，然後使用Stream連接，並隨時隨地欣賞音樂。

添加你的音樂到您的設備沒有iTunes，簡單，使用本地的無線網絡傳輸或下載音樂快速到你的iPhone，以發揮它沒有互聯網（離線模式）。這是一個多雲系，因此你可以聽音樂的名單，無論它們的存儲。

訪問您最喜愛的音樂在您的所有設備：iPhone，iPad的，iPod的庫，Box，Dropbox，谷歌驅動器，OneDrive，Yandex.Disk和您的計算機。聽你的音樂與先進和強大的媒體播放器。

"Farming Simulator 20 带您尽享精彩纷呈的农夫生活！您可以收割种类繁多的作物，照料猪、奶牛、绵羊等牲畜，新增的马匹可以让您跨上马背自由驰骋，用崭新的方式去探索农场周围的广袤土地。前往多变的市场出售农产品赚取金钱，可用于投资购买更多农业机械并扩建农场。

在 Farming Simulator 20 中，您可以拥有超过 100 种载具和工具，忠实再现行业内的知名品牌。移动平台首次迎来了全球排名前列的农业机械公司 John Deere，另外还有来自 CASE IH、New Holland、Challenger、Fendt、Massey Ferguson、Valtra、Krone Deutz-Fahr 等知名品牌的农机载具供您选用。

在 Farming Simulator 20 中，您可以在全新的北美风貌中开发、扩建农场，尽情享受丰富多彩的农业活动，其中包括新的农业机械及棉花、燕麦等作物。


Farming Simulator 20 的特点包括：

• 使用超过 100 种来自全球各大知名农业机械制造商的真实载具和工具
• 种植并收割种类繁多的作物，包括小麦、大麦、燕麦、油菜、向日葵、大豆、玉米、土豆、甜菜、棉花

• 全新 3D 画质展现农业机械的更多细节和更细致的北美风貌

tw.releaseNotes: 快來加入偵探皮埃爾的冒險之旅吧！
tw.description:
《迷宮大偵探》改編自日本IC4Design大熱插圖繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，由法國Darjeeling工作室研發完成，是一款老少皆宜的冒險解謎遊戲。本作採用獨特有趣的繪本畫風，帶你跟隨大偵探皮埃爾的腳步，穿梭於或熱鬧非凡、或變幻莫測的奇妙迷宮世界中，和豐富的人與物進行互動，尋找散佈在各個角落的隱藏線索，探索最終出口，直到解開所有謎題。

【劇情簡介】
著名的迷宮大偵探皮埃爾先生最近又有新案子了。收藏於歌劇市博物館的迷宮石被江洋大盜X先生偷走了！ 這東西會將整個城市變成一個巨大的迷宮，這注定會釀造一場悲劇。為了尋回丟失的迷宮石，皮埃爾已經踏上了抓捕X先生的道路。繞過層層阻礙，穿過艱難險阻，大偵探勢在必得！

【遊戲介紹】
在尋回寶石的旅途中，你將遇到許多有趣古怪的角色，穿過細節滿滿的文化博物館、南法風情的遺忘之都、浪漫的熱氣球城堡······抽絲剝繭挖掘支線故事的層層細節，瞭解整歌劇城。 或許你會問「這的確是個精美可愛的解謎遊戲，但挑戰性在哪呢？」好問題！在迷宮中，雖然只有一條正確的路可以通向出口，但卻有著數不清的路徑，部分會包含隱藏的寶藏和有趣的小遊戲。探索時請務必多多觀察，你一定會收穫意想不到的驚喜。

【遊戲特點】
- 探索巨型迷宮城
改編於IC4Design大熱兒童繪本《迷宮大偵探皮埃爾》，精緻的童趣手繪畫風帶你進入錯綜複雜、充滿細節的多彩世界
 
- 互動細節滿滿

us.description:
New version of the multi-awarded board game. Now in 3D. Includes improved AI, 3D landscape, new exclusive features.

*** Carcassonne fits that opening game niche that every game group needs. -Tyler Nichols, Board Game Quest
*** Carcassonne = Great game, great mechanics, great pieces, great fun! -The Board Game Family

A TILE PLACEMENT GAME OF CREATING LANDSCAPES, CLAIMING AREAS, AND GAINING POINTS
Discover or re-discover Carcassonne, the multi-awarded tile-based game in which players draw and place their tiles to build a medieval city. Place your cities, roads, abbeys or fields to enlarge your landscape, then place your followers, the meeples. Knights, robbers or farmers... Each meeple will help you control your territory and win points.
But be careful, you will need all your best strategy and tactics to maximum your points! Place your tiles and your meeples wisely to stop your opponents and win the game.

6 EXPANSIONS: ENLARGE YOUR LANDSCAPE AND OPTIMIZE YOUR POINTS
Thanks to the mini expansions ""The River"" and ""The Abbot"", you can embellish your landscape and vary your game to enjoy new ways to play! Double or even triple your points thanks to the new buildings in the Inns & Cathedrals expansion! And with the Traders & Builders expansion, score more points with the trading commodities and build faster with the builders! Discover the city of Carcassonne covered with a blanket of white snow in the Winter Edition... and look out for the Gingerbread Man and the bonus points he'll give you! Beware of the Dragon in ""the Princess and the Dragon"" expansion! He could eat your Meeples if you're not cautious. And be kind with the Princess: she might prefer you to other Meeples and toss them out of the cities!

FEATURES
• Accessible and tactical gameplay adapted from the award-winning Carcassonne board game    
• 6 expansions:

us.description:
A new evolution of match-3, combat, and adventure!
Hero Emblems II is a JRPG that combines elements of side-scrollers and match-3 games. Players control members of the Night Chasers, a group of heroic warriors, as they embark on an adventure to save their lands from an evil threat.

[Game Features]
◆ Thrilling match-3 battle experiences
Match three Emblems to clear them from the board and make your heroes attack. Clear four or more to generate Magic Emblems, allowing your heroes to unleash powerful skills. Perform combos to launch even more powerful attacks and vanquish your enemies!

◆ Traditional JRPG experience
In a world of magic and swordplay, players will control members of the Night Chasers as they embark on an adventure together. Enter deep caves, explore ancient ruins, unlock treasure chests, fight against ferocious monsters, upgrade your equipment in town, and gain new information from villagers in the local taverns. A exciting RPG experience is waiting for you in Hero Emblems II!

◆ Substitute Heroes
Each Hero possesses their own unique skills and backstory. There's Zack, the Human Warrior; Lucien, the Marten Knight; Sid, the Felinian Black Mage; Abner the Bard, and many more! Lead your favorite heroes into battle!

◆ Thrilling Japanese character voices in battles
Personalized character voices make combat a thrilling, intense and fun experience!

◆ More equipment
Enemies attack with a wide range of debuffs such as Poison, Ignition, Petrification or Curses. To fight against these tough opponents, you will need to choose your Heroes'  weapons and armor carefully, and make good use of accessories to resist enemy debuffs and boost your Heroes' abilities!

◆'Food Consumption System' for Enhancing Battle Power
A hero's adventure is always brimming with all sorts of challenges. Vicious monsters boast tremendous strength and always catch people off guard with their varied attack styles. Now, heroes can boost their abilities by indulging in delightful delicacies, allowing them to thwart monster attacks with a more refreshing rhythm!

◆One-time payment, IAP-free, and ad-free


A New Chapter in the Night Chasers' History
A long time ago, there was a mercenary group known as the Night Chasers. Instead of making money, these heroic warriors went around helping those in need. During the war, they helped a great many people who were suffering under tyranny and injustice. However, in the ensuing age of peace, the Night Chasers were no longer needed, and were forced to disband. Years later, four young people - Zack, Lucien, Sid, and Odelia - decided to carry on their legacy, forming the new Night Chasers.

One day, Zack and his party save an Elven girl named Dolores. Suffering from amnesia, Dolores cannot remember why she has ventured so far from the Elven Kingdom – only that she has been sent on an urgent quest. Concerned for her well-being, the Night Chasers take her into their fold, leading them to discover an ancient and terrible threat to the kingdom...

** Recommend to use iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 5th Gen./iPad Pro or later devices for better experiences.**

us.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

us.description:
MyTracks is an app that helps you keep track of your location using GPS data. It's perfect for various activities like hiking, running, walking, biking, and more. This app uses advanced technology to provide precise measurements and calculations.

Here's what you can do with MyTracks:
- Track your route: Whether you're hiking, running, or cycling, MyTracks can record your path and show it on a map.
- Save favorite locations: If there are specific places you want to remember, you can mark them as favorites in the app.
- Import and export data: MyTracks allows you to import and export data in various formats such as CSV, GPX, KML, and KMZ.
- Improve accuracy: You can take static GPS observations to get more accurate waypoints for your tracks.
- Easy navigation: The app provides a waypoint guide on the compass, making it easy for you to navigate to specific locations.
- Customizable waypoints: You can add waypoints manually or import them from your favorite locations. You can even add vectors with angle and distance.
- Coordinate conversion: MyTracks allows you to convert between four different coordinate formats (Decimal, DMS, MGRS, UTM) at any time.
- Additional features: The app displays glide ratio during recording, offers compass options in degrees or mils, supports MGRS Grid overlay on the map, and allows you to create routes to follow before starting your track.
- Detailed records: You can view your tracks on a map and replay the route. The app provides detailed statistics about your track and displays the saved waypoints associated with each track. You can also change the color of your tracks for easier identification.

Please note that using GPS continuously in the background can drain your device's battery quickly. If you have any feedback or questions, please feel free to contact us at miaozhi.ai@gmail.com

tr.description:
MyTracks is an app that helps you keep track of your location using GPS data. It's perfect for various activities like hiking, running, walking, biking, and more. This app uses advanced technology to provide precise measurements and calculations.

Here's what you can do with MyTracks:
- Track your route: Whether you're hiking, running, or cycling, MyTracks can record your path and show it on a map.
- Save favorite locations: If there are specific places you want to remember, you can mark them as favorites in the app.
- Import and export data: MyTracks allows you to import and export data in various formats such as CSV, GPX, KML, and KMZ.
- Improve accuracy: You can take static GPS observations to get more accurate waypoints for your tracks.
- Easy navigation: The app provides a waypoint guide on the compass, making it easy for you to navigate to specific locations.
- Customizable waypoints: You can add waypoints manually or import them from your favorite locations. You can even add vectors with angle and distance.
- Coordinate conversion: MyTracks allows you to convert between four different coordinate formats (Decimal, DMS, MGRS, UTM) at any time.
- Additional features: The app displays glide ratio during recording, offers compass options in degrees or mils, supports MGRS Grid overlay on the map, and allows you to create routes to follow before starting your track.
- Detailed records: You can view your tracks on a map and replay the route. The app provides detailed statistics about your track and displays the saved waypoints associated with each track. You can also change the color of your tracks for easier identification.

Please note that using GPS continuously in the background can drain your device's battery quickly. If you have any feedback or questions, please feel free to contact us at miaozhi.ai@gmail.com

tr.description:
A new evolution of match-3, combat, and adventure!
Hero Emblems II is a JRPG that combines elements of side-scrollers and match-3 games. Players control members of the Night Chasers, a group of heroic warriors, as they embark on an adventure to save their lands from an evil threat.

[Game Features]
◆ Thrilling match-3 battle experiences
Match three Emblems to clear them from the board and make your heroes attack. Clear four or more to generate Magic Emblems, allowing your heroes to unleash powerful skills. Perform combos to launch even more powerful attacks and vanquish your enemies!

◆ Traditional JRPG experience
In a world of magic and swordplay, players will control members of the Night Chasers as they embark on an adventure together. Enter deep caves, explore ancient ruins, unlock treasure chests, fight against ferocious monsters, upgrade your equipment in town, and gain new information from villagers in the local taverns. A exciting RPG experience is waiting for you in Hero Emblems II!

◆ Substitute Heroes
Each Hero possesses their own unique skills and backstory. There's Zack, the Human Warrior; Lucien, the Marten Knight; Sid, the Felinian Black Mage; Abner the Bard, and many more! Lead your favorite heroes into battle!

◆ Thrilling Japanese character voices in battles
Personalized character voices make combat a thrilling, intense and fun experience!

◆ More equipment
Enemies attack with a wide range of debuffs such as Poison, Ignition, Petrification or Curses. To fight against these tough opponents, you will need to choose your Heroes'  weapons and armor carefully, and make good use of accessories to resist enemy debuffs and boost your Heroes' abilities!

◆'Food Consumption System' for Enhancing Battle Power
A hero's adventure is always brimming with all sorts of challenges. Vicious monsters boast tremendous strength and always catch people off guard with their varied attack styles. Now, heroes can boost their abilities by indulging in delightful delicacies, allowing them to thwart monster attacks with a more refreshing rhythm!

◆One-time payment, IAP-free, and ad-free


A New Chapter in the Night Chasers' History
A long time ago, there was a mercenary group known as the Night Chasers. Instead of making money, these heroic warriors went around helping those in need. During the war, they helped a great many people who were suffering under tyranny and injustice. However, in the ensuing age of peace, the Night Chasers were no longer needed, and were forced to disband. Years later, four young people - Zack, Lucien, Sid, and Odelia - decided to carry on their legacy, forming the new Night Chasers.

One day, Zack and his party save an Elven girl named Dolores. Suffering from amnesia, Dolores cannot remember why she has ventured so far from the Elven Kingdom – only that she has been sent on an urgent quest. Concerned for her well-being, the Night Chasers take her into their fold, leading them to discover an ancient and terrible threat to the kingdom...

** Recommend to use iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 5th Gen./iPad Pro or later devices for better experiences.**

tr.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

tr.description:
Join more than a million musicians and improve your playing with Tunable - Music Practice Tools. More than a chromatic tuner, tone & chord generator, metronome, and recorder, Tunable is a music practice coach that can help you play steadily, in tune, and on beat anywhere you go. Jam-packed with features to help with ear training, breath support, rhythm, timing, and dynamics, Tunable is easy to use yet feature-rich. Tunable tracks your playing habits and gives feedback to help you improve. Equipped with a unique “tuning history” display for viewing pitch as you play, an easy to use metronome and a handy audio recorder, Tunable is the perfect toolkit for beginning to professional musicians. Grab Tunable today and use in your next practice session, group rehearsal, band class, or live performance.

Why are Broadway musicians, students at Juilliard, National Youth Orchestras and beginning instrumentalists using Tunable?

GET FEEDBACK ON HOW YOU PLAY
• It's like a music instructor in your pocket. Record a practice session and get a practice score with note graphs to help summarize your playing.

LEARN TO PLAY IN TUNE WITH SUSTAINED PITCH HISTORY™
• Visualize how steadily you play or sing. The straighter the white line, the more consistent the pitch. 

IMPROVE YOUR EAR WITH TONE AND CHORD GENERATOR
• Use the tone and chord generator to play and sustain chords with various tone options. Toggle between different temperaments to hear how they compare. 

KEEP TEMPO WITH AN ACCURATE METRONOME
• See the pulse with a visual metronome. View subdivision and current beat, with a large display and (optional) visual flash. 

RECORD YOUR SESSIONS AND SHARE WITH EASE
• Record practices and performances. Add reverb for a professional sound. Share recordings with family, friends, and teachers.

FEATURES OVERVIEW

TUNER
• Large, colorful tuning indicator clearly shows when in tune (green fills the screen)
• Clear, visual tuner with note, octave, cents (+\-), and frequency (Hz) display
• Sustained Pitch History™ tuning display to see how you’re sustaining notes over time
• Especially suited for wind instruments, strings, and vocals with note detection from Tuba to Piccolo
• Adjustable A=440 reference tone
• Create your own or change between Equal, Just, Pythagorean, and 15 other tuning temperaments

TONE AND CHORD GENERATOR
• Chromatic Tone Generator and Full Piano with multiple tone options
• Play and sustain single notes or chords
• Continues playing when the screen is locked or in the background

METRONOME
• Large number display with optional visual flash to see the downbeat and each subdivision
• Adjust tempo, beats per measure, and subdivision to fit your needs

RECORD PRACTICE SESSIONS
• Record and save unlimited recordings

AND MORE

Did Risk Analyst Plum turn himself into a liability with the Billiard Stick, or perhaps Lawyer Peacock cracked with the Meat Tenderiser. Did Signature Forger White sign off Boddy's death with the Silver Candelabra? Or maybe Con Artist Green phoned in a deadly performance with the Rotary Phone...

tr.description:
Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery.

Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. 

Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective.

In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! 

Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective!

HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 

1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime!
2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 
3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 
4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 
5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 
6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 
7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! 

FEATURES

- THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! 
- A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once.
- MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. 
- ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. 

Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

tr.releaseNotes:
The shadows over Hue County grow darker in the wake of a shocking murder.

Step into the elegant Noir Mansion and interrogate six suspects too sharp for their own good. They'll point fingers in every direction and offer up promises of honesty. 

But you know better. Trust nothing but your clue sheet...

Could it have been Crime Reporter Scarlett with the Mini Revolver? Maybe Private Detective Mustard used the "Civil War" Musket with Bayonet? Did Risk Analyst Plum turn himself into a liability with the Billiard Stick, or perhaps Lawyer Peacock cracked with the Meat Tenderiser. Did Signature Forger White sign off Boddy's death with the Silver Candelabra? Or maybe Con Artist Green phoned in a deadly performance with the Rotary Phone... 

With the Noir Mansion crime scene, you can toggle the special Noir filter at any time during your game! See the mansion in its full-colour glory, or drench it in deep, cinematic shadows. 

You'll also unlock Noir-themed cosmetics to dress up in true vintage style!

INCLUDES:
- A BRAND-NEW CRIME SCENE – The highly requested film-noir theme arrives in Clue/Cluedo!
- THEMED COSMETICS – This crime scene includes a new player avatar, a different card back, a themed clue sheet, a sleek dice set and 12 new tokens.
- MORE STORY TO EXPLORE – Delve into the murky backstories of each suspect and uncover their motives.
tr.description:
Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery.

Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. 

Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective.

In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! 

Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective!

HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 

1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime!
2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 
3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 
4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 
5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 
6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 
7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! 

FEATURES

- THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! 
- A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once.
- MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. 
- ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. 

Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

tr.releaseNotes: Join Pierre on his detective adventure through Opera City where he must find Mr. X!
tr.description:
Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective is an adventure puzzle game for children and adults alike! Adapted from the award-winning children's illustration book series by IC4DESIGN and developed by Darjeeling, Labyrinth City takes you on a trip through a fantastic world of underground cities, hot-air balloons, tree-tops and haunted houses. Find your way through each interactive maze, engage with colorful characters, explore hidden pathways, unlock pieces of clues and solve the mystery along the way.

【The Story】
A new case has arrived for Pierre the Maze Detective! Mr. X has stolen the Maze Stone, which has the power to turn the whole Opera City into a maze. Help Pierre and his friend Carmen find their way through the mazes and stop Mr. X before it's too late!

【The Game】
You play as Pierre, Opera City's renowned maze detective, and you must retrieve the Maze Stone stolen by the notorious thief Mr. X! Without you, Opera City is doomed, as the Maze Stone has the power to turn everything around it into an intricate labyrinth. "Beautiful and cute puzzle games are fine and all," I hear you say, "but what about the challenge?". A fine question! In a maze, although there is only one true path to the exit, there are countless trails to hidden treasures and mini-games. So pay close attention while exploring Opera City and you will be pleasantly surprised. 

【Features】
- Explore Opera City! 
Enter colorful worlds teeming with life and intricate details based on the best-selling children’s book series Pierre the Maze Detective by IC4DESIGN 

- Solve All Mysteries! 
More than 100 hidden objects and unique trophies to find, engaging puzzles and minigames to stimulate your brain 

- Interact With the Surroundings! 
Over 500 interactions possible with the characters, items, and background 

- Relive Childhood Memories! 
Each scene is based on a double-page illustration from the original work 

- Original soundtrack 

- Save the World!
 All levels are tied together by an overarching narration that will fill the detectives within us with purpose 

- Speaks Your Language! 
Available in English, Chinese (simplified and traditional), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Russian

pt.description:
MyTracks is an app that helps you keep track of your location using GPS data. It's perfect for various activities like hiking, running, walking, biking, and more. This app uses advanced technology to provide precise measurements and calculations.

Here's what you can do with MyTracks:
- Track your route: Whether you're hiking, running, or cycling, MyTracks can record your path and show it on a map.
- Save favorite locations: If there are specific places you want to remember, you can mark them as favorites in the app.
- Import and export data: MyTracks allows you to import and export data in various formats such as CSV, GPX, KML, and KMZ.
- Improve accuracy: You can take static GPS observations to get more accurate waypoints for your tracks.
- Easy navigation: The app provides a waypoint guide on the compass, making it easy for you to navigate to specific locations.
- Customizable waypoints: You can add waypoints manually or import them from your favorite locations. You can even add vectors with angle and distance.
- Coordinate conversion: MyTracks allows you to convert between four different coordinate formats (Decimal, DMS, MGRS, UTM) at any time.
- Additional features: The app displays glide ratio during recording, offers compass options in degrees or mils, supports MGRS Grid overlay on the map, and allows you to create routes to follow before starting your track.
- Detailed records: You can view your tracks on a map and replay the route. The app provides detailed statistics about your track and displays the saved waypoints associated with each track. You can also change the color of your tracks for easier identification.

Please note that using GPS continuously in the background can drain your device's battery quickly. If you have any feedback or questions, please feel free to contact us at miaozhi.ai@gmail.com

New version of the multi-awarded board game. Now in 3D. Includes improved AI, 3D landscape, new exclusive features.

*** Carcassonne fits that opening game niche that every game group needs. -Tyler Nichols, Board Game Quest
*** Carcassonne = Great game, great mechanics, great pieces, great fun! -The Board Game Family

A TILE PLACEMENT GAME OF CREATING LANDSCAPES, CLAIMING AREAS, AND GAINING POINTS
Discover or re-discover Carcassonne, the multi-awarded tile-based game in which players draw and place their tiles to build a medieval city. Place your cities, roads, abbeys or fields to enlarge your landscape, then place your followers, the meeples. Knights, robbers or farmers... Each meeple will help you control your territory and win points.
But be careful, you will need all your best strategy and tactics to maximum your points! Place your tiles and your meeples wisely to stop your opponents and win the game.

6 EXPANSIONS: ENLARGE YOUR LANDSCAPE AND OPTIMIZE YOUR POINTS
Thanks to the mini expansions ""The River"" and ""The Abbot"", you can embellish your landscape and vary your game to enjoy new ways to play! Double or even triple your points thanks to the new buildings in the Inns & Cathedrals expansion! And with the Traders & Builders expansion, score more points with the trading commodities and build faster with the builders! Discover the city of Carcassonne covered with a blanket of white snow in the Winter Edition... and look out for the Gingerbread Man and the bonus points he'll give you! Beware of the Dragon in ""the Princess and the Dragon"" expansion! He could eat your Meeples if you're not cautious. And be kind with the Princess: she might prefer you to other Meeples and toss them out of the cities!

FEATURES
• Accessible and tactical gameplay adapted from the award-winning Carcassonne board game    
• 6 expansions:
- The River, the Inns & Cathedrals, the Traders & Builders, the Winter Edition and Princess & Dragon are all available to purchase from the Game Shop.
- Unlock The Abbot for free using your Asmodee account.
• Up to 6 players! Play against the computer in solo mode, face off your friends in Pass and Play or challenge players from around the world in online mode

- field view which allows you to see the field possession of each player

pt.description:
A new evolution of match-3, combat, and adventure!
Hero Emblems II is a JRPG that combines elements of side-scrollers and match-3 games. Players control members of the Night Chasers, a group of heroic warriors, as they embark on an adventure to save their lands from an evil threat.

[Game Features]
◆ Thrilling match-3 battle experiences
Match three Emblems to clear them from the board and make your heroes attack. Clear four or more to generate Magic Emblems, allowing your heroes to unleash powerful skills. Perform combos to launch even more powerful attacks and vanquish your enemies!

◆ Traditional JRPG experience
In a world of magic and swordplay, players will control members of the Night Chasers as they embark on an adventure together. Enter deep caves, explore ancient ruins, unlock treasure chests, fight against ferocious monsters, upgrade your equipment in town, and gain new information from villagers in the local taverns. A exciting RPG experience is waiting for you in Hero Emblems II!

◆ Substitute Heroes
Each Hero possesses their own unique skills and backstory. There's Zack, the Human Warrior; Lucien, the Marten Knight; Sid, the Felinian Black Mage; Abner the Bard, and many more! Lead your favorite heroes into battle!

◆ Thrilling Japanese character voices in battles
Personalized character voices make combat a thrilling, intense and fun experience!

◆ More equipment
Enemies attack with a wide range of debuffs such as Poison, Ignition, Petrification or Curses. To fight against these tough opponents, you will need to choose your Heroes'  weapons and armor carefully, and make good use of accessories to resist enemy debuffs and boost your Heroes' abilities!

◆'Food Consumption System' for Enhancing Battle Power
A hero's adventure is always brimming with all sorts of challenges. Vicious monsters boast tremendous strength and always catch people off guard with their varied attack styles. Now, heroes can boost their abilities by indulging in delightful delicacies, allowing them to thwart monster attacks with a more refreshing rhythm!

◆One-time payment, IAP-free, and ad-free


A New Chapter in the Night Chasers' History
A long time ago, there was a mercenary group known as the Night Chasers. Instead of making money, these heroic warriors went around helping those in need. During the war, they helped a great many people who were suffering under tyranny and injustice. However, in the ensuing age of peace, the Night Chasers were no longer needed, and were forced to disband. Years later, four young people - Zack, Lucien, Sid, and Odelia - decided to carry on their legacy, forming the new Night Chasers.

One day, Zack and his party save an Elven girl named Dolores. Suffering from amnesia, Dolores cannot remember why she has ventured so far from the Elven Kingdom – only that she has been sent on an urgent quest. Concerned for her well-being, the Night Chasers take her into their fold, leading them to discover an ancient and terrible threat to the kingdom...

** Recommend to use iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 5th Gen./iPad Pro or later devices for better experiences.**

pt.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

pt.description:
Um dos melhores jogos de corta e massacra (hack-and-slash) agora no seu celular!

Originalmente lançado para PC em 2006, Titan Quest é um RPG de ação em um cenário mitológico. Os Titãs escaparam da prisão e estão determinados em destruir a Terra. Os Deuses não conseguem impedi-los e será necessário um herói para liderar essa luta épica. A vitória ou a derrota determinarão o destino da humanidade e dos olimpianos.

Você é esse herói! Crie o seu personagem, explore civilizações antigas como Grécia, Egito, Babilônia e China, e lute contra hordas de criaturas lendárias! Domine as artes de arco e flecha, esgrima ou magia e melhore seu personagem para destravar poderes incríveis! Descubra itens especiais para ajudá-lo a completar a sua missão: espadas lendárias, raios devastadores, arcos encantados e muito mais!

Especialmente adaptado para dispositivos móveis, esta versão oferece novos recursos:
● Jogue sem anúncios!
● Uma nova interface sensível ao toque
● Jogabilidade sensível ao toque completamente redesenhada
● Gráficos de alta qualidade
● Um mundo enorme e disponível para explorar
● Ciclo dia/noite completo
● 80 criaturas mitológicas diferentes: Minotauros, Ciclopes, Górgonas e muito mais
● 1200+ itens para descobrir
● 30 classes de personagem diferentes
● 150 habilidades de personagem diferentes 
● Hora da diversão colossal com mais de 60 horas 
● Modos de dificuldade escalável: as armas e os inimigos correspondem ao seu nível de habilidade 
● Dezenas de conquistas desbloqueáveis para descobrir 
● Sem anúncios, sem microtransações.

Misturando mitologia antiga com ação ininterrúpta, o Titan Quest é um clássico jogo de corta e massacra que oferece um ritmo rápido e intenso. Supere os desafios emocionantes e derrote os maiores inimigos de todos os tempos que estão tentando invadir o mundo dos dispositivos móveis!

DLCs disponíveis como compra in-app: 
● IMMORTAL THRONE - No DLC do Trono Imortal, você encontrará os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, enfrentará os ataques de Cerberus e se arriscará nas margens do Rio Styx. Você deve interpretar as profecias do vidente cego Tirésias, lutar ao lado de Agamenon e do Aquiles, além de usar os ardis de Odisseu para conquistar esta nova aventura sombria.
● RAGNARÖK - Nas terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa no Ragnarök DLC, você enfrentará os reinos dos celtas, dos homens do norte e dos deuses Asgardianos!
● ATLANTIS - Conheça um explorador no DLC de Atlantis e embarque em busca deste reino mítico. A chave está supostamente escondida no diário de Hércules. Dizem que o diário está localizado na cidade fenícia de Gadir. Comece uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental, incluindo a Arena do Tártaro para batalhas épicas!
● ETERNAL EMBERS - Invocado pelo lendário Imperador Yao, o Herói é chamado de volta ao Leste para lidar com uma ameaça demoníaca que está devastando a terra depois que o Telkine foi morto.

- Um Spire em mudança constante: toda vez que embarcar em uma aventura no Spire, a configuração dele se modifica. Escolha um caminho arriscado ou seguro, enfrente inimigos e escolha cartas diferentes, descubra novas relíquias - pode até lutar contra chefes diferentes!
- Relíquias poderosas para descobrir: itens poderosos, conhecidos como relíquias, podem ser encontrados no Spire. Os efeitos dessas relíquias podem melhorar consideravelmente o seu baralho a partir de interações poderosas.

pt.description:
Join more than a million musicians and improve your playing with Tunable - Music Practice Tools. More than a chromatic tuner, tone & chord generator, metronome, and recorder, Tunable is a music practice coach that can help you play steadily, in tune, and on beat anywhere you go. Jam-packed with features to help with ear training, breath support, rhythm, timing, and dynamics, Tunable is easy to use yet feature-rich. Tunable tracks your playing habits and gives feedback to help you improve. Equipped with a unique “tuning history” display for viewing pitch as you play, an easy to use metronome and a handy audio recorder, Tunable is the perfect toolkit for beginning to professional musicians. Grab Tunable today and use in your next practice session, group rehearsal, band class, or live performance.

Why are Broadway musicians, students at Juilliard, National Youth Orchestras and beginning instrumentalists using Tunable?

GET FEEDBACK ON HOW YOU PLAY
• It's like a music instructor in your pocket. Record a practice session and get a practice score with note graphs to help summarize your playing.

LEARN TO PLAY IN TUNE WITH SUSTAINED PITCH HISTORY™
• Visualize how steadily you play or sing. The straighter the white line, the more consistent the pitch. 

IMPROVE YOUR EAR WITH TONE AND CHORD GENERATOR
• Use the tone and chord generator to play and sustain chords with various tone options. Toggle between different temperaments to hear how they compare. 

KEEP TEMPO WITH AN ACCURATE METRONOME
• See the pulse with a visual metronome. View subdivision and current beat, with a large display and (optional) visual flash. 

RECORD YOUR SESSIONS AND SHARE WITH EASE
• Record practices and performances. Add reverb for a professional sound. Share recordings with family, friends, and teachers.

FEATURES OVERVIEW

TUNER
• Large, colorful tuning indicator clearly shows when in tune (green fills the screen)
• Clear, visual tuner with note, octave, cents (+\-), and frequency (Hz) display
• Sustained Pitch History™ tuning display to see how you’re sustaining notes over time
• Especially suited for wind instruments, strings, and vocals with note detection from Tuba to Piccolo
• Adjustable A=440 reference tone
• Create your own or change between Equal, Just, Pythagorean, and 15 other tuning temperaments

TONE AND CHORD GENERATOR
• Chromatic Tone Generator and Full Piano with multiple tone options
• Play and sustain single notes or chords
• Continues playing when the screen is locked or in the background

METRONOME
• Large number display with optional visual flash to see the downbeat and each subdivision
• Adjust tempo, beats per measure, and subdivision to fit your needs
• Accent or mute individual subdivisions
• Sync metronome to nearby devices so they run at the same tempo and in time (via Ableton Link)
• Select from over 30 metronome sounds
• Tempo Tap (tap metronome center to set a tempo)
• Continues playing when the screen is locked or in the background

RECORD PRACTICE SESSIONS
• Record and save unlimited recordings
• Receive a score and individual note graphs per recording
• Organize recordings into folders
• Search by name to find past recordings
• Easily share recordings and practice scores
• Playback recordings at 0x - 3x speed

AND MORE
• Transpose notes to any instrument
• 15 Notations to choose from
• AppleTV/AirPlay mirroring
• Dark and light themes
• Siri Shortcuts access to common tasks

Tunable is especially great with voice, wind, and string instruments:
• Guitar, Ukelele
• Piccolo, Flute
• Oboe, English Horn, Bassoon
• Clarinet
• Saxophone
• Trumpet and Cornet
• French Horn
• Tenor and Bass Trombone
• Euphonium and Tuba
• Violin, Viola, Chello, and Bass
• Voice

TESTIMONIALS
• "The best tuner, metronome, and recorder on iOS and a pitch-perfect bargain for any musician." — MacLife
• "Tunable shows musicians what pitch-perfect means as they play." — Engadget
• "Tunable doesn't just tell you how you sound -- it shows you." — FastCoDesign

pt.description:
Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ；
你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。

你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。

「Card.Note」九大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.全局手势化
下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。

5.语音录入
打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

6.要事提醒：
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

7.快捷高效
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

8.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

9.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com
